description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

v1.18.3 New Features
• Today's year (Western and Japanese calendar) now shows on the home page — Appears in small text below the month/day and day of week, like "2026/Reiwa 8".

v1.18.3 Fixes
• Fixed bug where Soryū Circulation "Kōjōmae direction" intermediate stops only showed up to City Hall — When boarding from Hanno City Hall, you can now see the complete route: Kōjōmae → Sengen → Municipal Housing... returning to Hanno Station.
• Unified Hanno City Hall (Mu-Ma bus) and City Hall Front (5931 bus) as the same stop — Consolidated separate stop displays into one.

v1.18.3 Notes
• Event details modals for the Tourism Association, Civic Hall, and other venues now display a "🔗 Information Source URL" link (display feature added in v1.18.2; data arrives in this release).

v1.18.4 New Features
• "UV" (ultraviolet strength) added to the weather section — Displays with color coding, like "☀ UV Very Strong". Five levels match Japan Meteorological Agency standards: Weak, Moderate, Strong, Very Strong, and Extreme. Check before heading out to decide on hats and sunscreen.
